rationale: Career at strong product companies (Swiggy, CRED) but entirely in DevOps/mobile/backend roles with no production ML or IR experience; IIT Kanpur MSc AI is a positive signal but self-described AI exposure is limited to online courses and a small RAG side project.

Most recent role is at Wayne Enterprises (fictional company, red flag) and career is data engineering focused on pipelines/warehousing with no production IR/retrieval/ranking work; skills list RAG and TensorFlow as advanced but career descriptions show no supporting evidence of NLP or search systems.

Non-technical career spanning marketing, sales, and project management at Infosys, Pied Piper (fictional), and Initech (fictional) with zero engineering or ML experience despite listing Computer Vision as an advanced skill.
Entire career is in non-technical roles (project management, sales, accounting) at Wipro IT services and fictional companies (Hooli, Initech) with no engineering depth or ML/IR experience whatsoever.

Career consists entirely of operations, HR, and mechanical engineering roles at Wayne Enterprises (fictional) and Initech (fictional), with no software engineering, ML, or IR experience; skills like Kubernetes and Image Classification are listed but contradict the non-technical role history.

Only 1.5 years of experience as a Sales Executive at TCS with no technical or ML background; the summary describes a marketing manager profile and the skillset (React, Excel, PowerPoint) has no relevance to IR/ranking engineering.

Content Writer with 1.4 years experience at Wipro IT services in a non-technical role; listing ASR as an advanced skill with high endorsements is clear keyword inflation that contradicts the actual career history.

Only 1.6 years of experience as a DevOps Engineer at Mindtree (IT services) doing pure cloud infrastructure work; PEFT listed as advanced with 48-month duration is implausible keyword inflation given the 19-month total career, and there is no evidence of ML or IR production work.

Has genuine ML production experience — XGBoost predictive modeling at Paytm and recommendation systems (collaborative filtering) at Haptik, plus Weaviate listed with 58 months of usage — but primary focus is computer vision/predictive modeling rather than IR/retrieval/ranking, and there is no evidence of NDCG/evaluation framework ownership or hybrid search deployment.

Entire 4.7-year career is at IT services firms (Cognizant, Tech Mahindra) in DevOps and frontend roles with no product-company ML work; Weaviate is listed as an advanced skill but career descriptions show only cloud infrastructure and mobile development with zero IR or ML production experience.
